name: @orygn/opa-mcp
description: Author, validate, debug, and explain Open Policy Agent (OPA) Rego policies through any MCP-compatible client.
long_description: Wraps the OPA CLI (opa fmt, check, eval, test, build, sign, etc.), the OPA REST API (policies, data, decisions, compile), and the Regal linter. Provides higher-level helper tools that use AI to explain decisions, generate test skeletons, describe policies, and suggest fixes.

opa_url.title: OPA Server URL
opa_url.description: Base URL of a running OPA server (only needed for opa_* runtime tools).

opa_token.title: OPA Bearer Token
opa_token.description: Bearer token if OPA is running with --authentication=token.

opa_binary.title: OPA Binary Path
opa_binary.description: Path to the opa binary. Defaults to 'opa' on PATH.

regal_binary.title: Regal Binary Path
regal_binary.description: Path to the regal binary (used by rego_lint). Defaults to 'regal' on PATH.

allowed_paths.title: Allowed Paths
allowed_paths.description: Root directories tools may read/write. When empty, file-based tools refuse to access the disk.
